label: Control Environment Simulator
info: Debug-only closed-loop simulator for scheduler, unified control, eSpire280 machine safety, generator sequencer, and islanding sequencer. Writes simulated telemetry to global.telemetry and never connects to live Modbus.

name: Scheduler Enabled
label: Scheduler Enabled
tooltip: Enable scheduled meter-rule dispatch in the simulator

name: Apply Simulator Input
Simulate Plant + Run Controller
Simulator Dashboard

demand {{msg.payload.plant.pcsDemandKw | number:1}} kW

PCS CRD Mode{{msg.payload.input.crdMode}}Site Export{{msg.payload.input.siteExportMode}} / target {{msg.payload.input.siteExportTargetImportKw | number:1}} kW / db {{msg.payload.input.siteExportDeadbandKw | number:1}} kW

History Samples{{msg.payload.diagnostics.historyCount}} / {{msg.payload.diagnostics.historyFile}}

{{msg.payload.schedule.meterRule | json}}
PCS On/Off{{msg.payload.pcs.onOffLabel}} ({{msg.payload.pcs.onOff}})PCS Global State{{msg.payload.pcs.globalStateLabel}} ({{msg.payload.pcs.globalState}})
PCS Run Mode{{msg.payload.pcs.runModeLabel}} ({{msg.payload.pcs.runMode}})GWC{{msg.payload.pcs.gridWireConnectionLabel}} ({{msg.payload.pcs.gridWireConnection}})

MBMU BMS Status{{msg.payload.mbmu.bmsStatusLabel}} ({{msg.payload.mbmu.bmsStatus}})SOC{{msg.payload.mbmu.soc | number:3}}
PV Curtailmentenabled {{msg.payload.pvCurtailment.enabled}} / target {{msg.payload.pvCurtailment.targetLimitPct * 100 | number:0}}% / active-limit {{msg.payload.pvCurtailment.activePowerLimitPct * 100 | number:0}}% / applied {{msg.payload.pvCurtailment.appliedLimitPct * 100 | number:0}}%Commanded Curtail kW{{msg.payload.pvCurtailment.requestedKw | number:1}} kW / {{msg.payload.pvCurtailment.reasons | json}}
Battery Voltage{{msg.payload.mbmu.batteryVoltageV | number:0}} VCell Voltagemax {{msg.payload.mbmu.maxCellVoltageV | number:3}} V / min {{msg.payload.mbmu.minCellVoltageV | number:3}} V
Current Limitscharge {{msg.payload.mbmu.maxChargeCurrentAllowedA | number:0}} Adischarge {{msg.payload.mbmu.maxDischargeCurrentAllowedA | number:0}} A
{{msg.payload | json}}

name: Build Trend Points
Collect Simulator History
Sync Dashboard Controls
func:
const defaults = {
  loadKw: 60,
  pvAvailableKw: 20,
  loadRangeKw: 10,
  pvRangeKw: 10,
  soc: 0.62,
  gridOutage: false,
  bmsNormal: true,
  pcsFault: false,
  maxCellVoltageV: 3.38,
  minCellVoltageV: 3.12,
  batteryVoltageV: 1100,
  crdMode: 'no-export',
  siteExportMode: 'no-restriction',
  siteExportTargetImportKw: 0.5,
  siteExportDeadbandKw: 0.8,
  scheduledControlEnabled: false
};
const input = msg.topic === 'scenario' && msg.payload === 'reset'
  ? Object.assign({}, defaults)
  : Object.assign({}, defaults, flow.get('simInput') || {});
const keys = [
  'loadKw',
  'pvAvailableKw',
  'loadRangeKw',
  'pvRangeKw',
  'soc',
  'crdMode',
  'siteExportMode',
  'siteExportTargetImportKw',
  'siteExportDeadbandKw',
  'scheduledControlEnabled',
  'gridOutage',
  'bmsNormal',
  'pcsFault',
  'maxCellVoltageV',
  'minCellVoltageV',
  'batteryVoltageV'
];
return keys.map(key => ({ topic: key, payload: input[key] }));
